metadata.name: Manage Swap Space
metadata.description: Create and activate a swap space to supplement physical memory
objectives: Activate the swap space and make it available persistently

hosts.name: servera
hosts.description: Target server for swap space configuration

tasks.name: Verify /dev/sdb2 swap partition exists
tasks.description: A swap partition /dev/sdb2 should exist on the disk
hints: Create partition with: sudo parted /dev/sdb mkpart myswap linux-swap 1001MB 1501MB

tasks.name: Verify /dev/sdb2 has swap partition type
tasks.description: The /dev/sdb2 partition should have the swap flag set
tasks.failure_message: Partition /dev/sdb2 does not have swap type flag
hints: Set partition type with: sudo parted /dev/sdb set 2 swap on
Or create partition with linux-swap type

tasks.name: Verify /dev/sdb2 is initialized as swap
tasks.description: The /dev/sdb2 partition should be formatted as swap space
tasks.failure_message: Partition /dev/sdb2 is not initialized as swap

tasks.name: Verify /etc/fstab entry for swap
tasks.description: An entry for the swap partition should exist in /etc/fstab
tasks.failure_message: fstab entry for swap is missing or incorrect
hints: Add to /etc/fstab: UUID=<your-uuid> swap swap defaults 0 0
Run: sudo systemctl daemon-reload after editing fstab

tasks.name: Verify swap space is active
tasks.description: The swap partition should be activated and in use
hints: Or activate from fstab: sudo swapon -a
